title: nastus elongatus
intro: Nastus elongatus, also known as Sensitive Plant or Touch-Me-Not, is a tropical plant native to South America, characterized by its compound leaves that fold up when touched. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Nastus elongatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Nastus elongatus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
